name: @moxxy/plugin-channel-discord
description: Discord channel for moxxy via discord.js. Treats Discord DMs and allow-listed guild channels as a bidirectional channel: prompts in, streamed assistant replies out (edit-throttled), button-based permission prompts, DM code pairing.
author: Michal Makowski <michal.makowski97@gmail.com>

requirements.name: @moxxy/plugin-vault
requirements.hint: discord resolves the vault from the service registry for its bot token + pairing; @moxxy/plugin-vault must load first

setup.title: Discord bot
setup.description: Create an application at https://discord.com/developers/applications, add a Bot, and under Bot → Privileged Gateway Intents enable MESSAGE CONTENT INTENT (required — without it the bot receives empty messages). Then paste the bot token below.

fields.label: Bot token
fields.description: Developer Portal → your app → Bot → Reset Token. Remember to enable the MESSAGE CONTENT privileged intent on the same page.
